$schema: Performance budget enforced in CI by tests/perf/check-bundle-budget.mjs
description: Hard ceilings on bundle and route-segment sizes. CI fails when any value is exceeded — bumping a budget should be a deliberate, reviewed decision, not a surprise.

totalJsKb.comment: Sum of all JS chunks Next.js emits, gzipped.

firstLoadJsKb.comment: Initial bundle a fresh visitor downloads on the home page (Next.js' 'First Load JS shared by all').

perRouteFirstLoadJsKb.comment: Tool pages — they include client-side state but should still be lean.
